'''Gorovod''' was the largest continent on the planet [[Desevro/Legends|Desevro]]. The city of [[Maslovar]] sprawled for hundreds of kilometers along its coastline, with the islands of the [[Swamplands]] trailing away to the south.<ref name="'GatORW" />

{{Loc-stub}}
